Our Expertise

Comprehensive Financial Mastery

Every service delivered with uncompromising professionalism and attention to detail.

Auditing & Assurance

Independent financial statement audits conducted by SAICA-registered auditors. We provide rigorous examinations ensuring accuracy, regulatory compliance, and stakeholder confidence through internationally recognized standards.

Tax Compliance

Complete SARS liaison including income tax, VAT, PAYE, and provisional tax. Strategic planning minimizes liabilities while ensuring full legal compliance and timely submissions.

Company Registration

Full CIPC incorporation services including name reservation, MOA preparation, and tax clearance certificates. Launch your enterprise with complete regulatory foundation.

B-BBEE Advisory

Strategic B-BBEE compliance consulting, verification readiness, and scorecard optimization. Navigate transformation requirements with expert guidance and maximize your rating.

Business Advisory

Strategic financial planning, cash flow optimization, budgeting, and growth consulting. Your dedicated partner for data-driven decision-making and sustainable expansion.

Payroll Management

Accurate payroll processing, UIF submissions, PAYE calculations, and all statutory requirements. Ensure employee satisfaction with timely, compliant compensation management.

  • SAICA Registered Professionals

    Fully qualified chartered accountants with verified credentials

  • Comprehensive Service Portfolio

    End-to-end financial solutions under one roof

  • Personalized Client Attention

    Dedicated accountants who understand your business

  • Competitive Fee Structure

    Premium service at transparent, fair pricing

  • Proven Track Record

    Over a decade of trusted service excellence

About MFH

Excellence in Every Engagement

MFH Chartered Accountants Inc. stands as a pillar of financial integrity and professional excellence in Gauteng's business community. Our practice has evolved from a commitment to superior service into a comprehensive firm serving entrepreneurs, growing SMEs, and established corporations.

We recognize that South African businesses face unique challenges—from navigating complex tax legislation to achieving meaningful B-BBEE transformation. Our team combines deep technical expertise with practical industry insight, delivering solutions that are both compliant and commercially astute.

Every client receives personalized attention from qualified professionals who genuinely care about their success. This relationship-focused approach, combined with our rigorous standards, has made MFH the trusted choice for over 1,000 businesses across Pretoria, Johannesburg, and greater Gauteng.

Service Coverage

Across Gauteng Province

🏛️

Pretoria

Headquartered in Laudium, serving Tshwane's diverse business ecosystem with comprehensive accounting and compliance services.

🏢

Johannesburg

Full-service coverage for Joburg's dynamic commercial landscape—from Sandton corporate towers to Soweto enterprises.

🌐

Gauteng

Province-wide support delivering consistent quality and expertise to businesses of every size and sector.
